assertions.expectation: Identifies PDB as the most likely/common cause of stuck upgrades
assertions.reason: Response explicitly states 'Your upgrade is likely blocked by pod eviction issues' and lists PDBs as '(Most Common Cause)' in the first diagnostic step

assertions.expectation: Provides kubectl command to check PDBs (kubectl get pdb --all-namespaces or similar)
assertions.reason: Provides 'kubectl get pdb -A -o wide' command which is equivalent to --all-namespaces

assertions.expectation: Provides commands to identify which pods are blocking the drain
assertions.reason: Includes multiple commands: checking pods on draining nodes with 'kubectl get pods -A --field-selector spec.nodeName=NODE_NAME' and finding stuck terminating pods

assertions.expectation: Includes resource constraint diagnosis (capacity issues, pending pods)
assertions.reason: Section 3 specifically covers resource constraints with commands to check pending pods, scheduling events, and node resource usage

assertions.expectation: Provides a fix for restrictive PDBs (patch or temporary adjustment)
assertions.reason: Provides kubectl patch command to temporarily relax PDB settings and includes backup/restore procedure

assertions.expectation: Mentions that GKE has a PDB timeout (up to 1 hour) after which it may force-drain, and that GKE sends notifications when eviction is blocked by PDB
assertions.reason: Does not mention GKE's PDB timeout behavior or force-drain capabilities, nor notifications about PDB blocking

assertions.expectation: Includes guidance on surge upgrade settings as a potential fix
assertions.reason: Provides gcloud command to increase max-surge-upgrade and set max-unavailable-upgrade as a fix for resource constraints

assertions.expectation: Mentions webhook issues as a possible cause
assertions.reason: Does not mention admission webhooks or webhook issues as a potential cause of stuck upgrades

assertions.expectation: Includes validation steps to confirm the fix is working
assertions.reason: Includes 'Monitor Progress' section with watch commands to track node upgrade progress and monitor stuck pods
